doc_name: Better Weather Actives LLC Recalls Better Weather Fix Elixir Due to Undeclared Mitragynine and Mitragynine Pseudoindoxyl

chunks.text: FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE – May 28, 2026 – Sheridan, Wyoming. Better Weather Actives LLC is voluntarily recalling ALL lots of Better Weather Fix Elixir 15 ml because the products may contain undeclared Mitragynine and Mitragynine Pseudoindoxyl (MP). MP is a more potent derivative of Mitragynine, or Kra
